reviews.name: Ngoni M.
reviews.appreciated: The creativity poured into every detail — it felt like the studio truly understood the vision.
reviews.recommend: Yes — they know their work and deliver with care.

reviews.name: Michael K.
reviews.appreciated: The attention to detail was incredible. My wedding dress fit perfectly.
reviews.recommend: Yes, 100% — I would recommend Fallot Correction Studio to anyone looking for true craftsmanship.
reviews.comments: Thank you for making such a meaningful day even more special.

reviews.name: Amara D.
reviews.appreciated: The silhouette was tailored so precisely it felt sculpted to me.
reviews.recommend: Absolutely — a rare blend of artistry and discipline.
reviews.comments: I've never received so many compliments in one night.

reviews.name: Lerato S.
reviews.appreciated: The patience and clarity through every fitting made the process feel calm.

reviews.name: Ife O.
reviews.appreciated: The structure of the jacket was extraordinary — every line intentional.
reviews.recommend: Yes, especially for anyone who values craft over trend.
reviews.comments: Worth every moment of the process.

reviews.name: Kwame A.
reviews.appreciated: The pieces told a story — the styling carried the entire shoot.
